clue: Odd satyr and girl entertain popular collection of characters
explanation: Odd SATYR is STR. Girl is G. A word for "popular" is IN. STR and G entertain IN to give STRING, which in computer science, is a collection of characters.
hints: To "entertain" is to contain or accept, and tells us that one part of the wordplay will contain another part.
The definition is "collection of characters", but we're not talking about people...
What is a short common word that means "popular"?
Girl can be substituted for the letter G.
